titleStmt.title: SII 17.41: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 41. (A.R. No. 39 of 1904). KŌGAḶI, HADAGALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the slab set up in front of the Vīrabhadrasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1454, Khara, Jyēshṭha, ba. 10, corresponding to � A.D., June 10. The Śaka year was current.

It records the gift of the mūlavīsa at the rate of 1 kāsu per hēru, by Mokeya Tippi-Seṭṭi Baseṭṭi of Baḷāri, Mosageya Guruvappa and others of the merchant community for a perpetual lamp for god Vīrabhadra of Kōgaḷi consecrated by Baseṭṭi, son of Tippiseṭṭi of Koṭūru. Virupaya of Ujini is said to have carved the image.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatu kogaḷiyaEngraved vertically to the proper right of the Liṅga at the top.
vīrabhadradēvaranu Ujiniya nirupaya
nu māḍidanuEngraved vertically to the proper left of the Liṅga at the top.
. 0 . śrīgaṇādhipataE namaḥ . nama
stuṁbi ṣirastuṁbi caṁdracā
mara cāravē trayilōkya nagarā
rabhaṁRead ‘raṁbha’mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [.]
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakavaruṣa 1454 ne kha
ra saṁvatsaradaEngraved vertically to the proper right ofjeṣṭa ba 10 lu śrī
matu kōgaḷiya vīrabhadra dēva
rige koṭūra tipisaṭeya
ra makaḷu baseṭiyaru pratiṣṭeya
māḍida vīrabhadradēvarige baḷā
riya mokeya tippiseṭi baseṭi
mosageya guruvappa vōḍivaliṁgi
seṭi caṁdiya liṁgiseṭi muṁttā
da samastahalaru Ubhaya nānā
dēśada seṭi paṭaṇa svāmiga
ḷu biṭu koṭa mūrevīsa
hēṟu 1 kaṁ kāsu 1 nu dē
vara naṁdādīpake salu
vadu . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī
śrī śrī śrī
yi kogaḷiya vīrabha
dra
Digital edition of SII 17.41 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
